## Summary

Describe the grammar, query, documentation, or packaging change.

## Validation

- [ ] `npm run ci:check`

## Grammar Checklist

- [ ] Added or updated positive corpus examples.
- [ ] Added or updated negative corpus examples.
- [ ] Regenerated parser artifacts when `grammar.js` changed.
- [ ] Kept receiver-type-dependent or client-specific syntax out of official rules.
- [ ] Reviewed generated artifact diffs when `tree-sitter-cli` changed.

## Privacy Checklist

- [ ] This PR does not include private source files, local paths, validation databases, production snippets, account data, or source-derived examples.
- [ ] Public samples are synthetic and minimized.
- [ ] Package contents were checked for private lab files.
